w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: We collect the following personal information from you when you manually or electronically submit to us your inquiry/
utilized solely for documentation and processing of your request within DepEd and, when appropriate, endorsement to other government agency/
that has/have jurisdiction over the subject of your inquiry. Only authorized DepEd personnel have access to this personal
information, the exchange of which will be facilitated through email and/or hard copy. DepEd will only retain personal data as long as necessary for the fulfillment of the purpose.
DepEd administrative and disciplinary authority/machinery, or other government agencies, and that to the best of my knowledge

office, other DepEd administrative and disciplinary authority/machinery, or other government agencies, I undertake to promptly inform the said offices/agencies of that fact within five (5) days therefrom.
